components.name: Chart
components.description: Main chart component that renders data visualizations (line, bar, area, pie, scatter, treemap, etc.) with automatic resize handling. Accepts a declarative data configuration and manages layout, axes, tooltips, and legend rendering internally.

props.name: data
props.description: Declarative chart configuration containing series data, axes, legend, tooltip, title, split, colors, and chart options

props.name: lang
props.description: Language code for i18n localization of chart labels

props.name: onResize
props.description: Callback fired whenever the chart container is resized

props.name: onReady
props.description: Callback fired when the chart has finished its initial render

components.name: ChartTooltipContent
components.description: Memoized component for rendering chart tooltip content. Supports custom renderers, row renderers, value/header formatting, and totals display. Falls back to DefaultTooltipContent when no custom renderer is provided.

props.name: hovered
props.description: Array of hovered data chunks to display in the tooltip

props.name: pinned
props.description: Whether the tooltip is pinned (stays visible)

props.name: renderer
props.description: Custom render function to completely replace default tooltip content

props.name: rowRenderer
props.description: Custom render function for individual tooltip rows

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: Format function or pattern for tooltip values

props.name: headerFormat
props.description: Format function or pattern for the tooltip header

props.name: hoveredPlotLines
props.description: Array of hovered plot lines to display in the tooltip

props.name: hoveredPlotBands
props.description: Array of hovered plot bands to display in the tooltip

props.name: totals
props.description: Configuration for displaying totals row in the tooltip

props.name: xAxis
props.description: X axis configuration used for formatting tooltip header values

props.name: yAxis
props.description: Y axis configuration used for formatting tooltip values

hooks.name: useAxis
hooks.description: Prepares and manages X and Y axis state asynchronously based on chart dimensions, series data, legend config, and raw axis options. Returns prepared axis objects for rendering.

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Object containing height, width, preparedChart, legendConfig, preparedLegend, preparedSeries, preparedSeriesOptions, boundsHeight, xAxis, yAxis

hooks.name: useAxisScales
hooks.description: Creates D3 scales for axis-related series. Memoizes scale creation based on bounds dimensions, series, axes, split, range slider state, and zoom state.
hooks.signature: const useAxisScales: (args: Args) => { xScale?: ChartScale; yScale?: (ChartScale | undefined)[] }

parameters.name: args
parameters.type: { boundsWidth: number; boundsHeight: number; series: PreparedSeries[]; xAxis: PreparedAxis | null; yAxis: PreparedYAxis[]; split: PreparedSplit; isRangeSlider?: boolean; rangeSliderState?: RangeSliderState; zoomState?: Partial<ZoomState> }
parameters.description: Scale creation arguments including bounds, series, axes, and optional zoom/range slider state

hooks.name: useBrush
hooks.description: Manages D3 brush behavior on SVG elements for selection interactions. Supports x, y, and xy brush types with configurable areas, border styling, handles, and callbacks for brush start/move/end events.

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Object containing areas, brushOptions, disabled, node, preventNullSelection, selection, type, onBrushStart, onBrush, onBrushEnd

hooks.name: useCrosshair
hooks.description: Renders crosshair lines (vertical and/or horizontal) on the chart plot area following hovered data points. Supports snap-to-point mode, custom colors, dash styles, and layer placement.

parameters.name: props
parameters.type: { xAxis: PreparedXAxis | null; yAxes: PreparedYAxis[]; width: number; height: number; xScale?: ChartScale; yScale?: (ChartScale | undefined)[]; split: PreparedSplit | undefined; plotElement: SVGGElement | null; dispatcher: Dispatch<object>; boundsOffsetLeft: number; boundsOffsetTop: number }
parameters.description: Crosshair configuration including axes, scales, split, plot element, and D3 dispatcher

hooks.name: usePrevious
hooks.description: Returns the previous value of a given variable from the last render cycle.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to track across renders

hooks.name: useRangeSlider
hooks.description: Manages the range slider control for chart data zooming. Computes axes, scales, shapes, brush selection, and click handling for the range slider UI below the main chart area.

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Object containing boundsWidth, boundsOffsetLeft, clipPathId, height, htmlLayout, onUpdate, preparedChart, preparedLegend, legendConfig, preparedSeries, preparedSeriesOptions, preparedRangeSlider, rangeSliderState, width, xAxis, yAxis

hooks.name: useShapes
hooks.description: Generates React elements and shape data for rendering chart series (bars, lines, areas, pies, scatter, treemaps, etc.). Handles series-to-shape mapping asynchronously with support for clip paths, zoom, and split layouts.
hooks.signature: const useShapes: (args: Args) => { shapes: React.ReactElement[]; shapesData: ShapeData[] }

parameters.name: args
parameters.type: { boundsWidth: number; boundsHeight: number; clipPathId?: string; clipPathBySeriesType?: ClipPathBySeriesType; dispatcher?: Dispatch<object>; htmlLayout?: HTMLElement | null; isOutsideBounds?: IsOutsideBounds; isRangeSlider?: boolean; series: PreparedSeries[]; seriesOptions: PreparedSeriesOptions; split: PreparedSplit; xAxis: PreparedAxis | null; xScale?: ChartScale; yAxis: PreparedYAxis[]; yScale?: (ChartScale | undefined)[]; zoomState?: Partial<ZoomState> }
parameters.description: Shape generation arguments including bounds, series, axes, scales, and layout options

hooks.name: useTooltip
hooks.description: Subscribes to chart hover events via a D3 dispatcher and returns the currently hovered data chunks, plot lines, plot bands, and pointer position for tooltip rendering.
hooks.signature: const useTooltip: (args: { dispatcher: Dispatch<object>; tooltip: PreparedTooltip; xAxis?: PreparedXAxis | null; yAxis?: PreparedYAxis }) => { hovered?: TooltipDataChunk[]; hoveredPlotLines?: ChartTooltipRendererArgs['hoveredPlotLines']; hoveredPlotBands?: ChartTooltipRendererArgs['hoveredPlotBands']; pointerPosition?: PointPosition }

parameters.name: dispatcher
parameters.description: D3 event dispatcher for chart hover events

parameters.name: tooltip
parameters.description: Prepared tooltip configuration with enabled flag and throttle

parameters.name: xAxis
parameters.description: Prepared X axis configuration for sorting and formatting

parameters.name: yAxis
parameters.description: Prepared Y axis configuration for sorting and formatting

hooks.return_type: { hovered?: TooltipDataChunk[]; hoveredPlotLines?: ChartTooltipRendererArgs['hoveredPlotLines']; hoveredPlotBands?: ChartTooltipRendererArgs['hoveredPlotBands']; pointerPosition?: PointPosition }

hooks.name: useZoom
hooks.description: Manages chart zoom via D3 brush interactions. Creates brush areas matching split plot regions, converts brush selections to zoom bounds, and calls onUpdate with the new zoom state.

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Object containing node, onUpdate, plotContainerHeight, plotContainerWidth, preparedSplit, preparedZoom, rangeSliderDomain, xAxis, xScale, yAxis, yScale
